/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -DTF_MAJOR_VERSION=2 -DTF_MINOR_VERSION=20 -DTF_PATCH_VERSION=0 -DTF_VERSION_SUFFIX="" -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_log_internal_structured_proto.so.2501.0.0 -o libabsl_log_internal_structured_proto.so.2501.0.0 CMakeFiles/log_internal_structured_proto.dir/internal/structured_proto.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:\$ORIGIN/../strings:\$ORIGIN/../base:\$ORIGIN/../numeric:\$ORIGIN/../types:" libabsl_log_internal_proto.so.2501.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings.so.2501.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings_internal.so.2501.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_string_view.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2501.0.0 ../numeric/libabsl_int128.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_base.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2501.0.0 ../types/libabsl_bad_variant_access.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_log_severity.so.2501.0.0
